context-mode.description: context-mode MCP server — saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution, FTS5 knowledge base, and session continuity.

arc-1.description: ARC-1 enterprise SAP ADT MCP — 12 intent-based tools: SAPRead, SAPWrite, SAPSearch, SAPActivate, SAPNavigate, SAPQuery, SAPTransport, SAPGit, SAPContext, SAPLint, SAPDiagnose, SAPManage. 3,474 tests. npm package. Safe by default (read-only).

aibap.description: aibap.mcp Go binary — 69 ABAP development tools: source editing, code intelligence, objects/packages, version history, locking/activation, testing/ATC, messages, ST22 dumps, transport, BAdIs, DEBUGGING (10 tools), export, system management. Requires SAP NetWeaver 7.40+ with ADT active.

mcp-abap-adt.description: TypeScript SAP ADT MCP — 13 tools: GetProgram, GetClass, GetFunctionGroup, GetFunction, GetStructure, GetTable, GetTableContents, GetPackage, GetTypeInfo, GetInclude, SearchObject, GetInterface, GetTransaction. MIT license.

mcp-sap-gui.description: SAP GUI MCP (mario-andreschak/mcp-sap-gui v0.1.3) — Python, module sap_gui_server. Installed editable from packages/mcp-sap-gui-mario.

mcp-sap-gui-kts.description: SAP GUI MCP (kts982/mcp-sap-gui v0.1.3) — Python. Installed editable from packages/mcp-sap-gui-kts-code.

sap-gui-mcp-jduncan.description: SAP GUI MCP (jduncan8142/sap_gui_mcp v0.1.0) — FastMCP-based, Python. Installed editable from packages/sap_gui_mcp.

sapient-mcp-py.description: Sapient MCP (toni-ramchandani/sapient-mcp v1.0.0) — Intelligent SAP GUI automation, RoboSAPiens-powered. Python.

abap-mcp-adt-powerup.description: ABAP MCP ADT PowerUp (babamba2/abap-mcp-adt-powerup) — Extended ADT MCP with advanced ABAP tools. Node.js.

sapgui-mcp-webgui.description: SAP GUI MCP WebGUI (Hochfrequenz/sapgui.mcp v0.13.4) — Chrome/Playwright browser automation for SAP Web GUI. Linux/Mac/Windows.

sapgui-mcp-go.description: SAP GUI MCP in Go (Hochfrequenz/sapgui.mcp v0.13.3) — TERTIARY fallback. Requires: go install github.com/Hochfrequenz/sapgui.mcp/cmd/sapgui-mcp@latest (when fixed upstream).

mcp-sap-notes.description: SAP Notes MCP — search and fetch SAP Notes from me.sap.com. Supports enriched metadata, correction details, ABAP object references. Archived repo — moved to marianfoo/sap-mcp-servers.

btp-mcp.description: SAP BTP MCP — 7 entity sets: GlobalAccount, Subaccounts, Directories, Assignments, AllowedDataCenters, EnvironmentInstances, AvailableEnvironments. OData-based via btp-admin-api-config.json. Built on odata-mcp-proxy.

odata-mcp-proxy.description: SAP Cloud Integration OData MCP — 32 entity sets: IntegrationPackages, IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts, MessageProcessingLogs, DataStoreEntries, KeystoreEntries, UserCredentials, OAuth2ClientCredentials, Partners, etc. npm package. Config-driven OData→MCP bridge. MIT license.

btp-sap-odata-to-mcp.description: BTP OData MCP — 3 progressive-discovery tools (discover-sap-data, get-entity-metadata, execute-sap-operation) instead of 200+ entity tools. S/4HANA/ECC via BTP Destination + Principal Propagation. Token-optimized.

plugin:ui5:ui5-mcp-server.description: UI5/SAPUI5/OpenUI5 app creation, API reference, linter, manifest validation, TypeScript conversion

plugin:sap-fiori-mcp-server:fiori-mcp.description: SAP Fiori app generation (CAP/RAP), OData metadata download, app modification, documentation search

plugin:mdk-mcp:mdk-mcp.description: SAP MDK (Mobile Development Kit) project creation, page/action/i18n generation, build/deploy

plugin:cds-mcp:cds-mcp.description: SAP CAP CDS model search, documentation, code snippets

pinecone-rag.description: Pinecone Vector DB RAG connector. Pre-configured, ready by uncommenting .env vars.

supabase-rag.description: Supabase pgvector RAG connector. Alternative to Pinecone. Pre-configured.

sf-mcp.description: SuccessFactors OData MCP — HCM cloud operations: Employee data, org structure, compensation, time off. Route prefix: sf_* actions.

sap-rfc-mcp-server.description: SAP RFC MCP server — ZROUTER dispatch via RFC. Default route for BAPI-based batch operations (MM, SD, FI, QM, PP, WM, CO, HCM, BASIS).

azure-ai-search.description: Azure AI Search RAG connector. Enterprise semantic search. Ready for production.

sap-pi-mcp.description: SAP PI/PO MCP (lopezmas/sap-pi-mcp-server) - legacy PI/PO integration. Message monitoring, channel management, adapter engine. Use for PI/PO migrations to CPI or dual-stack landscapes.

bw-modeling-mcp.description: BW Modeling MCP (dnic-dev/bw-modeling-mcp) - BW/4HANA modeling. DSO, InfoCube, DTP, transformation management. Use for BW data modeling and ETL pipeline operations.

erpl-adt.description: ERPL ADT MCP (DataZooDE/erpl-adt) - enterprise resource planning language ADT bridge. Specialized ERPL development operations.

odata-mcp-go.description: OData MCP in Go (oisee/odata_mcp_go) - lightweight Go-based OData bridge. Low-latency alternative to Node.js OData MCPs. Use for high-throughput OData query scenarios.

cloud-alm-itsm.description: Cloud ALM ITSM MCP (gregorwolf/cloud-alm-itsm-mcp) - SAP Cloud ALM IT Service Management. Incident, problem, change management via ALM APIs. Use for ALM operations and ITSM workflows.

datasphere-mcp.description: SAP Datasphere MCP (MarioDeFelipe/sap-datasphere-mcp) - Datasphere data modeling, spaces, views, remote tables. Use for Datasphere analytics and data federation operations.

sapient-mcp.description: Sapient MCP (toni-ramchandani/sapient-mcp) - SAP-focused AI agent with knowledge graph for faster lookups. Alternative orchestration path when speed priority over depth. Use when latency-critical: self-learn selects between sapient and zrouter paths based on MCP response times.

sap-cpi-mcp.description: Canonical local SAP CPI MCP stdio bridge. Exposes read tools plus gated deploy plan/commit with PUT and POST override fallback.

sap-apim-mcp.description: Canonical local SAP API Management MCP stdio bridge. Exposes proxy read and gated deploy/modify plan/commit with CSRF and method override fallback.

sap-cpi.description: SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) MCP — iFlow deploy/undeploy, message processing logs, trace logs, keystore, credentials, system status. Direct CPI tenant connection.

cf-cli-mcp.description: Cloud Foundry MCP — cf push/deploy, org/space management, service marketplace, logs, SSH. BTP Cloud Foundry runtime operations.

sap-api-management.description: SAP API Management MCP — API proxy lifecycle, policy deployment, security/traffic config, OpenAPI import, API Business Hub publication. Pre-configured for sap-api-policy skill.

mcp-integration-suite.description: 1nbuc/mcp-integration-suite — SAP Integration Suite API management (iFlow, package, message mapping, testing, monitoring). Requires S-User credentials or OAuth2 service key.

ci-mcp-server.description: lemaiwo/ci-mcp-server — configuration-driven SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) OData V2 API proxy. Exposes 32 entity sets (packages, logs, security material, Partner Directory).

abap-mcp.description: DimiDR/ABAP-MCP — Standalone MCP Server for agentic ABAP development (68 tools, method surgery, DDIC validation, Clean ABAP workflow). Credentials hardcoded — ${SAP_URL} resolution fixed.

mcp-calm-server.description: fr0ster/mcp-calm-server — SAP Cloud ALM MCP server. Exposes 54 tools covering all 9 Cloud ALM services.

sap-transport-mcp.description: Nidhideep/sap-transport-mcp — CTS Transport Request management (list, inspect, release, delete) via SAP ADT REST API.

vibing-steampunk.description: vibing-steampunk MCP — ADT-to-MCP bridge in Go, 257+ stars, 147 MCP tools, hyperfocused single-tool mode (~200 tokens). Covers debug/deploy/analyze ABAP, package health, dead code detection, ABAP LSP, WebSocket RFC handler.

erpl-adt-mcp.description: erpl-adt MCP — single-binary ADT CLI, zero-dependency, Go-based. Transport CRUD, ABAP source CRUD, ABAP Unit, ATC checks, object search. Latest release v2026.06.27.

guniweb-sap-mcp.description: guniweb-sap-mcp — multi-protocol MCP for OData V2/V4, IDocs, and RFC/BAPI. 22 tools across 4 tiers. 918 unit tests. 7 auth types. n8n-compatible.

sap-gui-library-mcp.description: sap-gui-library MCP — Python abstraction over SAP GUI Scripting COM API. pip install sap-gui-library. Requires SAP GUI 770+ with Accessibility Mode.

integration-suite-ui-mcp.description: Playwright-ready Web UI fallback for SAP Integration Suite/CPI. Uses logged-in user browser session; no credential parameters accepted.

apim-ui-mcp.description: Playwright-ready Web UI fallback for SAP API Management. Uses logged-in user browser session; no credential parameters accepted.

cap-mcp-plugin.description: SAP CAP MCP plugin fallback for CAP model search/build guidance.

notes.version: v6.0.0 - capability registry + fail-closed MCP launcher + Web UI fallbacks
notes.mcp_abap_adt_install: git clone + npm install + npm run build + configure .env
notes.mcp_sap_gui_install: git clone https://github.com/mario-andreschak/mcp-sap-gui + npm install + npm run build
notes.mcp_sap_gui_kts_install: git clone https://github.com/kts982/mcp-sap-gui + pip install -r requirements.txt
notes.all_servers_readonly: Mutable tools are gated by registry, launcher and approval broker.
notes.gui_fallback_requires: SAP GUI installed locally + RZ11 sapgui/user_scripting=TRUE + SAPLogon connection configured
notes.gui_web_enrich: Auto-searches web for missing navigation data: field IDs, screen numbers, BDC sequences
notes.rag_connectors: Pinecone, Supabase pgvector, Azure AI Search — pre-ready, activate via .env
notes.healthcheck: python scripts/healthcheck.py - verifies configured MCPs and .env completeness
notes.self_learn: python scripts/self_learn.py — Hermes-style context adaptation, auto-optimizes routing
notes.karpathy_format: All operations follow Think→Simplify→Surgical→Verify. Caveman compression default.
notes.comparison_repos: See COMPARISON.md for full 70+ repo analysis
notes.planned_mcps: Planned servers must be added to .agents/registries/mcp-capabilities.json before routing.
